GreenhouseId.name: greenhouse_id
GreenhouseId.description: Site-unique greenhouse identity; the same slug used in MQTT topics, controller REST paths, and DB rows (RFC-007).

ProfileId.name: profile_id
ProfileId.description: Crop-profile identity, unique within the site.

From.name: from
From.description: Start of the telemetry window (RFC 3339 UTC). Must be at or before `to`.

To.name: to
To.description: End of the telemetry window (RFC 3339 UTC). Must be at or after `from`.

Metric.name: metric
Metric.description: Restrict the analytics response to one metric; omit for all metrics.

Interval.name: interval
Interval.description: Time-bucket size for the aggregation. Defaults to 1h when omitted.

EventGreenhouseId.name: greenhouse_id
EventGreenhouseId.description: Scope the activity feed to one greenhouse; omit for the whole fleet.

EventKind.name: kind
EventKind.description: Filter the feed to one event kind.

EventSeverity.name: severity
EventSeverity.description: Filter the feed to a minimum severity.
